name: Adjustable Open Ring
desc: An open-band design with a sparkling stone centrepiece. The adjustable band ensures a comfortable fit for most finger sizes, making it a versatile gifting option.

name: Classic Solitaire Ring
desc: A timeless solitaire design featuring a brilliant round-cut cubic zirconia set in sterling silver. Perfect for everyday elegance or as a statement piece.

name: Twisted Band Ring
desc: An elegant twisted band ring with sparkling white zirconia accents. The intertwining design symbolises eternal connection and adds a modern touch to classic silver jewellery.

name: Floral Cluster Ring
desc: A beautiful floral cluster design with multiple brilliant-cut stones arranged in a bloom pattern. Delicate yet eye-catching, perfect for special occasions.

name: Ring CSR482
desc: A finely crafted sterling silver ring from Classic Silver Place, made for lasting shine and everyday elegance.

name: Minimalist Band Ring
desc: Clean lines and a polished finish define this minimalist band. Versatile enough to be worn solo or stacked with other rings for a layered look.

name: Oval Stone Ring
desc: Featuring a large oval-cut centre stone, this ring makes a bold impression. The classic prong setting highlights the stone brilliance from every angle.

name: Eternity Band Ring
desc: A full eternity band set with a continuous row of brilliant round-cut stones. Symbolising endless love, this ring is ideal as a wedding band or anniversary gift.

name: Marquise Cut Ring
desc: The elongated marquise cut stone creates a slimming effect on the finger. Set in a sleek silver band with side-stone accents for added brilliance.

name: Halo Diamond Ring
desc: A dazzling halo setting surrounds the centre stone with a ring of smaller stones, maximising sparkle and giving the impression of a larger centrepiece.

name: Princess Cut Ring
desc: The sharp, geometric lines of the princess cut give this ring a modern edge. A bold choice for those who appreciate contemporary fine jewellery.

name: Vintage Filigree Ring
desc: Intricate filigree metalwork surrounds a sparkling centre stone in this vintage-inspired design. Each detail is hand-finished for exceptional quality.

name: Stackable Thin Ring
desc: Slim and delicate, this stackable ring is designed to be worn alone or layered with multiple bands. A wardrobe essential for the modern jewellery lover.

name: Heart Shape Ring
desc: A romantic heart-shaped centre stone set in a polished silver band. A heartfelt gift for anniversaries, Valentine's Day, or any expression of love.

name: Ring CSR2301
desc: A finely crafted sterling silver ring from Classic Silver Place, made for lasting shine and everyday elegance.

name: Cocktail Statement Ring
desc: Bold and glamorous, this cocktail ring features a large cluster of stones set in an elaborate silver mounting. Designed to turn heads at any event.

name: Pear Drop Ring
desc: The elegant pear-shaped stone tapers to a fine point, creating a graceful teardrop silhouette. Timeless and feminine, perfect for bridal or evening wear.

name: Three Stone Ring
desc: Representing the past, present, and future, this three-stone ring is rich in symbolism and beauty. Each stone is individually prong-set for maximum brilliance.

name: Geometric Band Ring
desc: Clean geometric shapes and baguette-cut stones define this architectural ring. A contemporary design for those with a bold, modern aesthetic.

name: Rope Twist Ring
desc: A classic rope-twist design crafted in polished sterling silver. The textured surface catches light beautifully, adding dimension without the need for stones.

name: Classic Stud Earrings
desc: Timeless round stud earrings featuring brilliant cubic zirconia set in sterling silver. A wardrobe staple that pairs effortlessly with any outfit, day or night.

name: Small Hoop Earrings
desc: Sleek small hoops in polished sterling silver. Lightweight and comfortable for all-day wear, these hoops add a subtle polish to any look.

name: Drop Stud Earrings
desc: A delicate teardrop stone drops gracefully below the earlobe. Simple yet sophisticated, these earrings transition seamlessly from desk to dinner.

name: Floral Stud Earrings
desc: Inspired by nature, these floral studs feature petals of sparkling stones arranged in a bloom formation. Sweet, feminine, and perfect for gifting.

name: Chandelier Earrings
desc: Cascading tiers of sparkling stones create a dramatic chandelier effect. These statement earrings are designed for evening wear and special occasions.

name: Long Tassel Earrings
desc: Elegant long earrings with a delicate chain tassel effect. The movement adds a playful, fashion-forward touch to both casual and formal ensembles.

name: Geometric Drop Earrings
desc: Sharp geometric shapes and baguette-cut stones give these earrings a modern, architectural feel. A bold choice for the contemporary jewellery enthusiast.

name: Pearl & Silver Studs
desc: Classic faux pearl studs framed by a delicate sterling silver setting. Understated luxury that never goes out of style, ideal for professional and bridal settings.

name: Huggie Hoop Earrings
desc: Snug-fitting huggie hoops encrusted with pave-set cubic zirconia. These hoops sit close to the ear for a refined, polished appearance.

name: Cluster Dangle Earrings
desc: A rich cluster of sparkling stones dangles elegantly from a silver post. These earrings are bold enough for evenings yet refined enough for the office.

name: Teardrop Dangle Earrings
desc: A single large teardrop-cut stone swings freely for a graceful, eye-catching silhouette. Classic proportions make these suitable for a wide range of occasions.

name: Statement Drop Earrings
desc: A dramatic drop earring featuring an intricate arrangement of mixed-cut stones. For those who believe jewellery should make a statement, this piece delivers.

name: Heart Pendant
desc: A classic heart-shaped pendant with a sparkling cubic zirconia centre. Worn on a fine silver chain, it makes the perfect romantic gift for someone special.

name: Star Pendant
desc: A dainty five-point star pendant that captures light beautifully. Minimalist and celestial, this pendant adds a subtle sparkle to everyday looks.

name: Cross Pendant
desc: A finely crafted cross pendant in polished sterling silver. A meaningful piece that carries deep personal and spiritual significance.

name: Infinity Pendant
desc: The infinity symbol rendered in sparkling silver with CZ accents. A popular choice symbolising endless love, friendship, or possibility.

name: Butterfly Pendant
desc: A delicate butterfly pendant featuring enamel wings and sparkling stone details. Light, colourful, and full of life, a joyful gift for any occasion.

name: Circle Pendant
desc: A sleek open-circle pendant, a modern symbol of wholeness and continuity. Minimalist design that pairs well with layered necklace looks.

name: Floral Pendant
desc: A beautifully detailed flower pendant with stones set in each petal. Feminine and elegant, inspired by the natural beauty of blooming flowers.

name: Initial Letter Pendant
desc: A personalised initial pendant crafted in polished sterling silver. A thoughtful and personal gift that holds special meaning for the recipient.

name: Moon & Star Pendant
desc: A crescent moon cradling a sparkling star, a timeless celestial motif. This pendant carries an air of mystery and romance, perfect for dreamers.

name: Teardrop Pendant
desc: A graceful pear-shaped stone set in a simple silver mount. Elegant in its simplicity, this pendant draws attention without overwhelming the neckline.

name: Evil Eye Pendant
desc: The protective evil eye motif set with vibrant blue cubic zirconia. A culturally rich piece believed to ward off negative energy while adding striking colour.

name: Layered Chain Necklace
desc: A multi-strand layered necklace that combines different chain styles for a curated, fashion-forward look. Each strand features delicate CZ accents that catch the light.

name: Tennis Necklace
desc: A classic tennis necklace set with a continuous line of brilliant round-cut cubic zirconia. Glamorous and timeless, the ultimate special occasion necklace.

name: Bracelet CSB156
desc: A sterling silver bracelet with clean finishing and comfortable wear for daily or occasion styling.
